title: ranunculus dissectus subsp. aragazii
intro: Ranunculus dissectus subsp. aragazii, also known as Aragaz's ranunculus or Ethiopian ranunculus, is a plant species belonging to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus dissectus subsp. aragazii are thought to include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
